title: behavtaskatlas: a file-first atlas of sensory-guided decision-making tasks
description: behavtaskatlas links task families, protocols, datasets, implementations, and reproducible vertical slices for sensory-guided decision-making tasks in behavioral neuroscience. Each release bundles curated YAML records, harmonization adapters, baseline analyses, in-browser meta-analysis tooling, and a static atlas site. See https://behavtaskatlas.vercel.app/ for the live atlas and https://github.com/aeronjl/behavtaskatlas for the source.
